_meta.description: Metadata for the GIC register data file
_meta.spec: ARM Generic Interrupt Controller Architecture Specification (IHI0069H)

GICD.title: Distributor
GICD.brief: The GICD registers control interrupt distribution to CPU interfaces. One Distributor per GIC instance.

GICR.title: Redistributor
GICR.brief: The GICR registers control per-PE interrupt forwarding. One Redistributor per PE.

GITS.title: Interrupt Translation Service
GITS.brief: The GITS registers control message-based (LPI/MSI) interrupt translation. Optional component.

v3.brief: GICv3 — Adds affinity routing, Redistributors, system registers (ICC_*), LPI support

v4.brief: GICv4 — Adds direct injection of virtual LPIs; all GICv3 features present

_meta.icc_system_registers_note: ICC_* registers are system registers accessed via MRS/MSR. They are documented in the ARM Architecture Reference Manual (AARCHMRS) and are cross-referenced here for discovery. Use arm-reg skill (query_register.py) to query their field layouts.
